hero.subtitle: Discover the rigorous 28-step hiring and integration process that separates Smart Sourcing USA from transactional outsourcing vendors.

traditional.title: Traditional Outsourcing
traditional.description: Take your call, assign a warm body to a cubicle, send generic workers without vetting. Zero cultural fit, minimal screening, high turnover. You're just another seat to fill.

smartsourcing.title: Smart Sourcing USA
smartsourcing.description: Deep skills assessment, Criteria testing, cultural alignment, pre-training through SmartSourcing University, and 12-month ongoing support. You get integrated team members, not vendors.

steps.title: 1. Quick Phone Call
steps.description: Generic intake call, surface-level requirements gathering

steps.title: 2. Assign to Cubicle
steps.description: Whoever is available gets assigned—no cultural fit assessment

steps.title: 3. Minimal Screening
steps.description: Resume review only, no skills testing or competency validation

steps.title: 4. Start Work Immediately
steps.description: No training, no integration support, sink or swim approach

steps.title: 5. High Turnover
steps.description: When it doesn't work, replace with another warm body and repeat

steps.title: 6. No Accountability
steps.description: No follow-up, no performance tracking, you're on your own

process28.title: The Smart Sourcing USA 28-Step Process
process28.subtitle: From pre-training to 12-month follow-up, every step designed to ensure long-term success
process28.tagline: 😄 Yeah, we paved this road too.

phases.title: Phase 1: SmartSourcing University Pre-Training
phases.description: We recruit and train candidates through SmartSourcing University before client needs arise. Students complete role-specific programs, earn certifications, and graduate to our prepared talent pool with documented credentials, skills assessments, and work samples.

phases.title: Phase 2: Client Match & Rigorous Assessment
phases.description: When you engage us, we create customized job posts and strategically match candidates from our talent pool. Candidates complete TWO Criteria Corp assessments, undergo comprehensive screening interviews, and pass through our quality gate. Only the top performers advance to you.

phases.title: Phase 3: Interview, Hire & Setup
phases.description: Pre-vetted candidates receive interview preparation training before you meet them. You conduct the interview and make the final hiring decision. We then handle contracts, equipment assessment and provisioning, accounting setup, and administrative processing—all while you retain operational control.

phases.title: Phase 4: Integration & Day 1 Launch
phases.description: Your dedicated account representative is assigned. We conduct Train-the-Trainer sessions with your internal manager and deliver comprehensive 90-day onboarding materials. Day 1 begins with your team member fully equipped, trained, and supported for seamless integration into your workflows and culture.

phases.title: Phase 5: Ongoing Success & Long-Term Partnership
phases.description: Structured follow-ups at 30, 60, and 90 days ensure smooth integration and address any early challenges. Strategic reviews at 6 months assess skill advancement opportunities. At 12 months and beyond, we conduct annual performance reviews and provide continuous improvement recommendations. Support continues as long as your team member is with you.

criteria.title: 🎯 The Criteria Assessment Difference
criteria.intro: Why do we invest in Criteria Corp assessments? Because generic interviews can't predict construction competency. Objective data can.

cards.title: Technical Skills Validation
cards.description: Software proficiency tests measuring actual AutoCAD, Revit, PlanSwift, or Excel capabilities through timed practical exercises.

cards.title: Cognitive Ability Assessment
cards.description: Problem-solving, pattern recognition, calculation accuracy, and engineering judgment evaluation.

cards.title: Communication Competency
cards.description: Written and verbal English proficiency measuring technical explanation clarity and documentation quality.

cards.title: Personality & Cultural Fit
cards.description: Behavioral assessments measuring teamwork orientation, customer service mindset, and adaptability to your company culture.

cards.title: Construction Domain Knowledge
cards.description: Code interpretation, specification understanding, and industry-specific methodology comprehension.

cards.title: Predictive Performance Data
cards.description: Assessment scores correlate with actual job performance—reducing hiring risk by 40-60% compared to interviews alone.

comparisonTable.subtitle: See exactly where traditional outsourcing fails and Smart Sourcing USA delivers

cta.title: Ready to Build with Confidence?
cta.description: Experience the difference between transactional outsourcing and connection-based team building. Our 28-step process ensures you get integrated team members, not cubicle workers.
